title: Risk Analyst Vacancy at Manappuram Finance - 2026 Batch

jsonLd.title: Risk Analyst Vacancy at Manappuram Finance - 2026 Batch
jsonLd.description:
Manappuram Finance is actively seeking a talented and motivated Risk Analyst to join our dynamic team in Ghaziabad. This is an excellent opportunity for professionals who are passionate about making a real impact in a fast-growing organization.

About Manappuram Finance:
Manappuram Finance is a leading organization in the On-site sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Prepare and analyze financial statements, reports, and budgets
• Prepare MIS reports for senior management review
• Maintain general ledger and ensure accurate bookkeeping
• Monitor financial performance against targets and provide variance analysis
• Conduct due diligence for mergers, acquisitions, and investments
• Develop financial models and projections for business planning
• Prepare annual reports and investor presentations

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• MBBS / MD / MS from recognized medical college
• 1-3 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in SQL
• Proficiency in SAP FICO
• Proficiency in Credit Analysis
• Proficiency in Tally
• Proficiency in Financial Reporting
• Proficiency in Bloomberg Terminal
• Proficiency in Budgeting
• Proficiency in Forecasting

Work Mode: On-site - Work from our office

What We Offer:
• Transportation and conveyance allowance
• Mobile and internet reimbursement
• Flexible working hours
• Employee stock options (ESOPs) for eligible roles
• Provident Fund and Gratuity as per company policy
• Annual performance appraisal
• Salary Range: 4 LPA - 9 LPA per annum

Location: Ghaziabad, Uttar Pradesh, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Manappuram Finance!

educationRequirements.credentialCategory: MBBS / MD / MS from recognized medical college
